# ReviewNet Trigger Keywords

## Skill Activation

- review pr
- review file
- review branch
- code review
- review impact
- synxis guidelines

## Route Keywords

- Checklist route:
  - checklist, quick gate, pre-submit, review gate
- Full review route:
  - guideline, deep review, full standards, category A-L
- Impact route:
  - impact, blast radius, callers, transitive risk

## Guard Keywords (route away)

- tax, taxrule, taxcalculator -> tax skill
- ohip, dumboBroker, neweventtype -> ohip skill
- architect, archon, ad2, adr, son, srd -> architect skill
- nomenclature, app id, synxisnom -> synxisnom skill
